# atlassian_jira_project (Resource)

Manages a Jira Cloud project.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "atlassian_jira_project" "example" {
  key              = "EXAMPLE"
  name             = "Example Project"
  project_type_key = "software"
  lead_account_id  = "5a1234abcdef567890123456"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `key` (String) The project key (e.g. "PROJ"). Changing this forces recreation of the resource.
- `lead_account_id` (String) The account ID of the project lead.
- `name` (String) The name of the project.
- `project_type_key` (String) The project type key. One of: software, service_desk, business. Changing this forces recreation of the resource.

### Optional

- `assignee_type` (String) The default assignee type. One of: PROJECT_LEAD, UNASSIGNED.
- `description` (String) The description of the project.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the project.
